items.title: Genius-apple/RusTorch — RusTorch is a production-grade deep learning framework re-imagined in Rust. It combines the usability you love from PyTorch with the performance, safety, and concurrency guarantees of Rust. Say goodbye to GIL locks, GC pauses, and runtime errors. Say hello to RusTorch.
